title: urtica dioica subsp. sondenii
intro: Urtica dioica subsp. sondenii, also known as stinging nettle, is a subspecies of the plant Urtica dioica. It is a perennial flowering plant with stinging hairs that cause irritation when touched. The medicinal properties of Urtica dioica subsp. sondenii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and swelling. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing symptoms of arthritis and improving digestion.
